meaning: vt.熄灭,消灭,压制,使黯然失色,偿清
examples: The firemen did their best to extinguish the fire.
Apart from the fire, the water used to extinguish it also caused a lot of damage to Notre Dame Cathedral.
However many generations succeed us in coming centuries, none of them will ever see this species that we extinguish.
Perhaps deliberately, perhaps as a side effect of the high interest rates required to extinguish inflation.
Firefighters were called out to extinguish a burning vehicle early on Wednesday, officials said.
